{{Item
| name = 
| image = Super treat.png
| id = super_treat
| type = Treats
| stackable = 64
}}
<blockquote>This treat will raise your dog's level up by 1 (also by 1 spendable point) until your dog reaches level 40.
</blockquote>

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| [[Training Treat]] <br>+ Golden Apple
|[[File:Super treat crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on your dog to use the item.

== Used In ==
* [[Master Treat]]
* [[Feathered Mantle]]

== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
* In the future, there might be a massive overhaul of the treat mechanism.
